label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 15

extraction.one_line_summary: MÄDER Gino soloed to victory from 87.3km out after escaping elite 25-rider break that fractured peloton, while YATES Adam gained 15 seconds with late attack from GC group.
tactical_patterns: Movistar chased 25-rider break despite missing it, fracturing peloton at 51+km/h pace in opening hour.
Jumbo-Visma planted riders in multiple break waves (Sepp Kuss early, Christoph Wike later) guaranteeing result.
MÄDER Gino rejected ARU Fabio's company at 87.3km, preferring solo over collaboration with secondary chasers.
YATES Adam attacked GC group on category-three climb while others hesitated, banking 15 seconds without chase response.

rider_signals.MÄDER Gino: positive: chose 87km solo over waiting for chasers, suggesting exceptional TT/descending confidence paid off
rider_signals.WIKE Christoph: positive: Jumbo planted him in secondary chase group, secured second place while teammates protected GC
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: showed opportunism attacking GC group on minor cat-3 climb when others passive, gained time
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: neutral: hesitated when Yates attacked, considered chase but declined to commit
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: negative: couldn't hold Mäder's pace after initial breakaway selection, reabsorbed by chasers
